top_signals.title: Apache going down near Oman a sign of air combat evolution, analysts warn
top_signals.summary: Experts say the U.S. Army Apache that went down near Oman offers a snapshot into how air assets must now contend with cheaper, rapidly evolving drones.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Transparency data: HMT workforce management information: May 2026
top_signals.summary: This document details monthly management information on staff numbers and paybill costs within HM Treasury and its agencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Waymo recalls about 3,900 robotaxis after some drove into 'freeway construction zones'
top_signals.summary: After some Waymo robotaxis drove into closed construction zones, the company implemented a recall to fix underlying software issues.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Eleven people taken to hospital following fire at Tokyo elementary school
top_signals.summary: The fire started around 11 a.m at Takinogawa Daisan Elementary School in Kita Ward.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chancellor backs former coalfield areas with new investment to end decline and encourage local talent
top_signals.summary: Communities in former coalfield areas of Britain will benefit from new jobs and business opportunities, as the Chancellor confirms investment in projects that support local talent and boost growth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Transparency data: OSCAR II – publishing data from the database: June 2026
top_signals.summary: The fourth and final quarterly OSCAR transparency release for 2025 to 2026.

top_signals.title: Celsius’ Mashinsky gets permanent trading ban in CFTC settlement
top_signals.summary: The US commodities watchdog has settled with Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky, ending the agency’s first-ever case against a crypto lending platform.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
